ideation: This animation sequence simulates the anticipation and excitement of a slot machine. The arms start in a neutral position, then move to mimic the pulling of a lever, followed by a brief pause before ending in a celebratory pose.  In the first frame, the arms are relaxed at the sides. In frame two, the right arm moves upward and forward, simulating the pulling of a lever. The left arm stays neutral. Frame three shows both arms slightly raised in anticipation, palms facing each other. Frame four shows both arms raised high in a celebratory gesture, palms facing upward.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, waiting for the spin
the right arm pulls the imaginary slot lever down
both arms rise slightly, anticipating the result
jackpot! both arms shoot up in celebration
